java.awt.geom/Path2D/curveTo.name: curveTo
signatures: public abstract void curveTo(double x1, double y1, double x2, double y2, double x3, double y3)
java.awt.geom/Path2D/curveTo.description:
Adds a curved segment, defined by three new points, to the path by
drawing a Bézier curve that intersects both the current
coordinates and the specified coordinates(x3,y3),
using the specified points(x1,y1)and(x2,y2)as
Bézier control points.
